Messages.Message: all elite enemies has sound cue when spawn and drop red sugar after kill them, some of them will gain additional ability when lower 50% hp 全精英虫子刷出时会有音效提示，击杀后红糖，有的精英低于半血会有进一步额外能力

Messages.Message: stone spawned, will keep spawning exploder on you (will self despawn after 14 seconds)飞石已出现，将持续召唤小自爆在玩家脚边(14秒后自毁)
kursite praetorian shooter r has spawn, it period spawn stomp turret around it (turret invinsible but will despawn after 4 seconds) 氪石禁卫射手,会周期性在其周围放置炮塔（炮塔无敌但4秒后销毁）

sentinel leader spawned, will keep spawning sentinel. if killed will also kill all sentinel spawn by it. it will spawn 2 instead 1 while lower hp than 50% 哨卫队长已出现，将持续召唤哨卫。哨卫队长死亡后所有哨卫也会一同死亡, 低于50%血量时会额外召唤一只哨卫
elite warden spawned. it can buff all grunt,slasher and guard making them immune stun and fear. warden also heal them when reach hp lower than 50% 典狱长老大已出现. 在场时战士三兄免疫眩晕和恐惧，低于半血时还会为它们回复血量
elite patrolbot spawned, it has 3 attack types and will change based on player distance 巡逻机器精英已出现，拥有三种攻击手段并且会根据矮人和它距离切换攻击手段
